name: Jacques Bogart S.A.
summary: Jacques Bogart S.A. produces and sells fragrances and cosmetics in Paris and internationally. The company operates a network of 390 perfumeries under own name points of sale, which include 38 in Israel, 32 in France, 87 in Germany, and 224 in Belgium and Luxembourg. It markets its fragrance products under the JACQUES BOGART +, CARVEN +, CHEVIGNON +, and TED LAPIDUS + brand names; cosmetic products under the STENDHAL +, METHODE JEANNE PIAUBERT +, and APRIL + brand names; and fashion products under the TED LAPIDUS FASHION + brand name. The company was founded in 1975 and is based in Paris, France.
